metadata.description: B2B outbound sales plugin: 6 specialist agents produce a research-grounded cold-outbound playbook with a recording-driven coaching loop and role-play mode.

plugins.name: sales
plugins.description: 6-agent B2B outbound sales plugin. Interviews you, refreshes the cold-outbound research landscape, builds your ICP and prospect-list strategy, writes scripts and multi-touch cadences with cited frameworks, sets up your CRM, runs role-play practice with a Claude-played prospect, and ingests call recordings via Deepgram/Azure Speech for Gong-style coaching analysis. State lives in .sales/ in the target project. Composes with brand (reads voice.md), marketing (provides closed/lost feedback), and greenfield (reads data-model.md).
